problem id: ba73cc70
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHR(2)

examples:
  01011110 -> 00000101
  10110011 -> 00101000
  01010011 -> 00010100
  01111110 -> 00000111
  10000111 -> 00100000
  01011001 -> 00010100
  11100100 -> 00001000
  00111100 -> 00000011

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 00011101
